name: Liu Bang

skills.name: Royal Ambition
skills.description: Gains 1 mark every second, for up to 4 marks. Basic Attacks expend all marks, dealing additional magical damage per mark. At maximum marks, the next Basic Attack is enhanced into a ranged attack.

skills.name: Dominator's Shield
skills.description: Grants himself a shield. If the shield is still intact when it expires, it will deal damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Staggering Charge
skills.description: Charges up and dashes forward, damaging and stunning enemies in his path.

skills.name: Battlefield Command
skills.description: Provides a shield to a teammate. After a short delay, teleports to the teammate and gains Movement Speed.

tips: Liu Bang is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Spikemail → Blazing Cape → Eye of the Phoenix → Longnight Guardian → Frigid Charge.
Run Fate for stats that match Liu Bang's Tank kit. Take Smite & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Dominator's Shield → Staggering Charge → Battlefield Command → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Liu Bang excels into Marco Polo, Meng Ya, Shouyue. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.
Liu Bang sits at Tier B globally (50.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Liu Bang good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Liu Bang is Tier B Tank with 50.2% win rate, 0.2% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Liu Bang build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Spikemail, Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix, Longnight Guardian, Frigid Charge. Run Fate arcana with Smite & Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Liu Bang?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying into Liu Bang. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Liu Bang completes core items. Liu Bang struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Liu Bang counter?
faqs.answer: Liu Bang is strong into Marco Polo, Meng Ya, Shouyue according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Liu Bang when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Liu Bang good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Liu Bang sits at Tier B globally (50.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Liu Bang play?
faqs.answer: Liu Bang is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Tank, Mage). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Liu Bang?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite & Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Liu Bang or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Liu Bang vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.2% more often globally. Choose Liu Bang when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Liu Bang?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Tank picks unless targeting a one-trick.
